title: evolvulus cordatus
intro: Evolvulus cordatus, also known as Blue Daze, is a flowering plant species in the family Convolvulaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Evolvulus cordatus include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Evolvulus cordatus can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in topical applications, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
